title: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow has released the official notification for Academic Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Uttar Pradesh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow has released the official notification for Academic Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Uttar Pradesh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned for the Academic Assistant position.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate/MBA from a reputed institute/university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks.
qualification.details: Academic Assistant: Post Graduate/MBA from a reputed institute/university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 40,000/- plus HRA as per applicable norms
salary_details.details: Academic Assistant: Rs. 40,000/- consolidated monthly fellowship plus HRA as per applicable norms.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Lucknow to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Academic Assistant position at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Academic Assistant post at IIM Lucknow is June 3, 2026. Ensure your application is completed before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Academic Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree or MBA from a recognized institute or university, completed in regular mode with a minimum of 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the Academic Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official website for any updates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Academic Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated monthly fellowship of Rs. 40,000/- along with House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per the applicable norms of IIM Lucknow.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Academic Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Academic Assistant position primarily involves a Personal Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Academic Assistant position must be submitted exclusively through the online mode via the link provided on the IIM Lucknow website.

faq.question: Q7. Can I apply offline for the Academic Assistant position?
faq.answer: No, hard copies of applications will not be entertained. Only online applications submitted through the designated link will be considered valid.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Academic Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Academic Assistant position is offered on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions specified.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Lucknow located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226013.

faq.question: Q10. Who should I contact if I face any difficulties during the online application process?
faq.answer: In case you encounter any issues while filling out the online application form, you may reach out for assistance by writing an email to [email protected].
